title: Grid Single Select with Other + NA
description: This is a Single Select Grid question with one Other box and one None option (Exclusive over the Grid)

title: Rank to 5 options with Other
description: Question for Rank to 5 options with Other specify box

title: Repeat Header in Grid
description: Repeating the header if there are too many options(Responses) in the Grid Question.

title: Check Sequential answers in Text Grid
description: This is to check if the answers are in sequence or not in a multi-text grid.

title: Rank up to 5 with other specify and exclusive options.
description: Rank up to 5 Responses with other Specify Option and exclusive options in a Grid.

title: Age Screening Using DOB (Text Input). Under 18 Termination
description: Calculates respondent age from a DOB stored as text (DD/MM/YYYY) and terminates the interview if age is below 18.

title: PRF section
description: PRF section is patient profile section shown in loop for atleast 3 patients. PRF section questions can vary from project to project.
questionType: PRF loop with block of questions (SA, MA, OE, Grid)
projectName: 25-078939-01-01 AZ HCC Himalaya ATU W13 2026 Q1

title: Tooltip / Hover text
description: Tooltip is a small, contextual message box that appears when hover over text or tapping on text. It can be used on any type of question.

title: Numeric Total to 100%
description: Numeric Total to 100%, Show auto sum at bottom of column.

title: Slider 5 scale - Categorical with Tooltip
description:
Slider question for categorical is a type of single select question where respondents indicate their answer along a continuous scale by dragging a slider instead of picking a fixed option.
Tooltip is a small, contextual message box that appears when hover over text or tapping on text. It can be used on any type of question.

title: Carousel
description: Carousel question is a type of question that allows respondents to evaluate multiple title: Numeric with Mutually Exclusive options
description: Numeric with Mutually Exclusive options. Upon entering value in numeric box, selection of exclusive options is automatically removed. Upon selecting exclusive options numeric box clears out.

title: Single Select Grid with Mutually Exclusive option
description:
Single Select Grid with Mutually Exclusive option outside the grid.
If exclusive option is selected, grid answers for all categories is removed. And if grid is answered then automatically excusive selection is unchecked.

title: Art card

Art card images may vary from project to project.

title: Rank drag and drop
description: This type of question allows the respondent to drag the statements and drop it in a box where it gets ranked accordingly. Number of ranks can vary from project to project.

title: Taking numeric value from categorical questions pre-code.
description: Taking numeric value from categorical questions pre-code.
tags: taking numeric value from categorical questions pre-code

title: Row wise sum 100
description:
Per row sum must equal 100.
This is a generic function which will work for multiple questions.

title: Multiple text boxes, minimum 5 words in first text box
description: Multiple text boxes, minimum 5 words in first text box is mandatory.
tags: minimum 5 words in first text box

title: Dynamic Scale Order
description: In the first run scale order will be 1-7 and in the next run order will be 7-1.

title: Numeric grid with column name
description: Grid with numeric box besides the statement for each specific column with its name
projectName: Assignment #173 - 25-009866-01-02 UV in the Gulf Region - Patients

title: Question with Mandatory Link Interaction
description: This question requires the user to click on a link embedded in the question text before selecting any options. The survey will only allow progression to the next screen after the link has been clicked. Selecting an option without clicking the link will not advance the survey.
projectName: Assignment #173 - 25-009866-01-02 UV in the Gulf Region - Patients

title: Open-Ended (OE) text box question with minimum word validation
description: OE text box question with validation to accept minimum number of words in a box

title: Open-Ended (OE) text box question with minimum character validation
description: OE text question with validation to accept minimum number of characters in a box

title: Date validation to avoid overlap with each other
description: Grid question with validation to ensure treatment dates don't overlap with each other and that the end date of the last treatment taken is before or same date as in previous question
